sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66952" key="metasth/qion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταστήθιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, part of the <sense id="n66952.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">palm</tr_> of the hand, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.238</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
